zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes Georg Hüther於1620年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀時，他的父親Martin Hüther31歲，母親Catharina Wagner31歲。他於1644年1月8日與Anna Appollonia Hanss在可特格希 貝也茨魏布呂肯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1679年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johannes Georg Hüther于1620年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀时，他的父亲Martin Hüther31岁，母亲Catharina Wagner31岁。他于1644年1月8日与Anna Appollonia Hanss在可特格希 貝也茨魏布呂肯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1679年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hüther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Hans, Ralf.

variants.name: Huether
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Ernst, Ewald, Klaus, Kurt, Lothar, Otto, Reinhold.
German (Hüther): occupational name for a herdsman, field guard, or guardian, Middle High German hüetære. Compare Huther .

variants.name: Huter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Manfred, Theodor.
occupational name for a hatter, Middle High German huotære, huoter.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes Georg Hüther was born in 1620, in Bottenbach, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Martin Hüther, was 31 and his mother, Catharina Wagner, was 31. He married Anna Appollonia Hanss on 8 January 1644, in Zweibrücken, Bavaria. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1679, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes Georg Hüther est né en 1620, à Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Martin Hüther, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catharina Wagner, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Anna Appollonia Hanss le 8 janvier 1644, à Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1679, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johannes Georg Hüther 1620 in Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Martin Hüther 31 und seine Mutter Catharina Wagner 31. Er hat am 8. Januar 1644 in Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern Anna Appollonia Hanss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1679 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Georg Hüther è nato il nel 1620 nel Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Martin Hüther, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Catharina Wagner, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Anna Appollonia Hanss il 8 gennaio 1644, nel Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1679, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannes Georg Hütherが1620年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスボッテンバチで生まれた時，父Martin Hütherは31歳，母Catharina Wagnerは31歳であった。1644年1月8日にクoニグレイチ バイエルンズウエイブルuクンでAnna Appollonia Hanssと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1679年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johannes Georg Hüther(이)가 1620년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 벗텐바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Martin Hüther(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharina Wagner(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1644년 1월 8일 ko니그레이치 베이른 즈위브uc켄에서 Anna Appollonia Hanss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1679년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Georg Hüther nasceu em 1620, em Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Martin Hüther, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Catharina Wagner, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Appollonia Hanss em 8 de janeiro de 1644, em Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1679, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes Georg Hüther родился в 1620 г. в местности боттенбач, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Martin Hüther было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catharina Wagner, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Appollonia Hanss 8 января 1644 г. в местности звибрuккен, кoниграич беиирн. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1679 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johannes Georg Hüther nació en 1620, en Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Martin Hüther, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Catharina Wagner, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Anna Appollonia Hanss el 8 de enero de 1644, en Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1679, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
